[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile screen displaying a manga or webtoon cover with the title "Shut Up, Evil Dragon! I don't want to raise a child with you..." and a notice that login is no longer required to read chapters. The cover features an anime-style illustration of a woman with long white hair and a dragon-like tail, and a man in a dark outfit. The background is blurred, focusing attention on the characters and title.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Shut Up, Evil Dragon! I don’t want to raise a child with you…

Shut Up, Malevolent Dragon! I Don’t Want to Have Any More Children With You

Notice : Sekarang kamu gak perlu login untuk membaca chapter.

Home  
Explore  
Library  
All Series

# Structured Version

## Title
- **Shut Up, Evil Dragon! I don’t want to raise a child with you…**

## Subtitle / Alternate title
- **Shut Up, Malevolent Dragon! I Don’t Want to Have Any More Children With You**

## Notice (banner)
- **Notice : Sekarang kamu gak perlu login untuk membaca chapter.**

## Navigation (bottom)
- Home  
- Explore  
- Library  
- All Series  

# Notes
- The image also contains a Chinese title inside the cover art, but it’s too small/blurred to read accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
